docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT'S TRUE NAME. TRUE NAME: SHEW FAN TANG FILED BY DEFENDANT TANG, SHEW FAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2022 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO JAN-13-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CHINYERE EBOCHIE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHEW FAN TANG (TRUE NAME OF DEFENDANT) IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER RICHARD PHAM. OTHER APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT WITNESS: ROBERT CHING, CONTRACTOR. THE PLAINTIFF PROVIDED THE COURT WITH A COPY OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE WHICH WAS DONE BY THE SHERIFF DEPARTMENT BUT NOT FILED WITH THE COURT. THE INTERPRETER/SON WAS SITED BY THE PLAINTIFF AS TO INVOLVEMENT IN THE CASE, AND THE JPT BECAME UNCOMFORTABLE WITH THE INTERPRETING SKILLS OF THE SON/INTERPRETER. THEREFORE THE JPT CONTINUED THE MATTER FOR A COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR CANTONESE INTERPRETER.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF CHINYERE EBOCHIE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHEW FAN TANG WITH WITNESSES: RICHARD PHAM (SON) AND ROBERT P CHIANG (CONTRACTOR) IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY PROVISIONALLY QUALIFIED CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT HAVE EVIDENCE TO PROVE THAT THE DAMAGE IS CAUSING BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGEPROTEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY EBOCHIE, CHINYERE TANG, SHEW FAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY EBOCHIE, CHINYERE AS TO DEFENDANT TANG, SHEW FAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY EBOCHIE, CHINYERE TANG, SHEW FAN
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
